## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passed.
- [ ] `npm run docs:check` passed and user-visible capability changes are reflected in `docs/project-capabilities.json`.
- [ ] `npm run privacy:scan` passed.
- [ ] No `.env`, `config/yard-runs.local.json`, `data/`, snapshots, logs, screenshots, or local research files are included.
- [ ] No credentials, app tokens, private keys, Orbit device IDs, MAC addresses, home addresses, or property-specific notes are included.
- [ ] Any remote access, bind-address, CORS, auth-token, or write-control change is explicitly called out for security review.
